revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Japanese princesses | state = {{{state|collapsed}}} | image = [[File:Japan Kouzoku Flag 16ben.svg|80px|link=|alt=]] | title = Japanese princesses | titlestyle = background:#CC0033; color:#FFFFFF; {{box-shadow border|a|#BFA648|2px}} | groupstyle = background:#CC0033; color:#FFFFFF; {{box-shadow border|a|#BFA648|2px}} | abovestyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | belowstyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | above = The generations indicate descent from [[Emperor Meiji]], who founded the [[Empire of Japan]]. | listclass = hlist | group1 = 1st generation | list1 = * Shizuko, Princess Hisa ([[:ja:久宮静子内親王|ja]]) * [[Princess Masako Takeda|Masako, Princess Tsune]] * [[Fusako Kitashirakawa|Fusako, Princess Kane]]* * [[Princess Nobuko Asaka|Nobuko, Princess Fumi]] * [[Toshiko Higashikuni|Toshiko, Princess Yasu]]* * Takiko, Princess Sada ([[:ja:貞宮多喜子内親王|ja]]) | group2 = 2nd generation | list2 = ''None'' | group3 = 3rd generation | list3 = * [[Shigeko Higashikuni|Shigeko, Princess Teru]]* * [[Sachiko, Princess Hisa]] * [[Kazuko Takatsukasa|Kazuko, Princess Taka]]** * [[Atsuko Ikeda|Atsuko, Princess Yori]]** * [[Takako Shimazu|Takako, Princess Suga]]** * [[Yasuko Konoe|Princess Yasuko of Mikasa]]** * [[Masako Sen|Princess Masako of Mikasa]]** | group4 = 4th generation | list4 = * [[Sayako Kuroda|Sayako, Princess Nori]]** * [[Princess Akiko of Mikasa]] * [[Princess Yōko of Mikasa]] * [[Princess Tsuguko of Takamado]] * [[Noriko Senge|Princess Noriko of Takamado]]** * [[Ayako Moriya|Princess Ayako of Takamado]]** | group5 = 5th generation | list5 = * [[Aiko, Princess Toshi]] * [[Mako Komuro|Princess Mako of Akishino]]** * [[Princess Kako of Akishino]] |below = ''* Reduced to commoner status with the abolition of titles of nobility by the American occupation authorities.''
''** Lost the title upon her marriage.'' }} [[Category:Japan navigational boxes|Princesses]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Princesses]]

{{Navbox | name = Japanese princesses | state = {{{state|collapsed}}} | image = [[File:Japan Kouzoku Flag 16ben.svg|80px|link=|alt=]] | title = Japanese princesses | titlestyle = background:#CC0033; color:#FFFFFF; {{box-shadow border|a|#BFA648|2px}} | groupstyle = background:#CC0033; color:#FFFFFF; {{box-shadow border|a|#BFA648|2px}} | abovestyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | belowstyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | above = The generations indicate descent from [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]], who founded the [[:en:Empire of Japan|Empire of Japan]]. | listclass = hlist | group1 = 1st generation | list1 = * Shizuko, Princess Hisa ([[:ja:久宮静子内親王|ja]]) * [[Princess Masako Takeda|Masako, Princess Tsune]] * [[:en:Fusako Kitashirakawa|Fusako, Princess Kane]]* * [[Princess Nobuko Asaka|Nobuko, Princess Fumi]] * [[Toshiko Higashikuni|Toshiko, Princess Yasu]]* * Takiko, Princess Sada ([[:ja:貞宮多喜子内親王|ja]]) | group2 = 2nd generation | list2 = ''None'' | group3 = 3rd generation | list3 = * [[Shigeko Higashikuni|Shigeko, Princess Teru]]* * [[Sachiko, Princess Hisa]] * [[:en:Kazuko Takatsukasa|Kazuko, Princess Taka]]** * [[:en:Atsuko Ikeda|Atsuko, Princess Yori]]** * [[Takako Shimazu|Takako, Princess Suga]]** * [[Yasuko Konoe|Princess Yasuko of Mikasa]]** * [[:en:Masako Sen|Princess Masako of Mikasa]]** | group4 = 4th generation | list4 = * [[Sayako Kuroda|Sayako, Princess Nori]]** * [[Princess Akiko of Mikasa]] * [[Princess Yōko of Mikasa]] * [[Princess Tsuguko of Takamado]] * [[Noriko Senge|Princess Noriko of Takamado]]** * [[:en:Ayako Moriya|Princess Ayako of Takamado]]** | group5 = 5th generation | list5 = * [[:en:Aiko, Princess Toshi|Aiko, Princess Toshi]] * [[:en:Mako Komuro|Princess Mako of Akishino]]** * [[Princess Kako of Akishino]] |below = ''* Reduced to commoner status with the abolition of titles of nobility by the American occupation authorities.''
''** Lost the title upon her marriage.'' }} [[Category:Japan navigational boxes|Princesses]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Princesses]]

{{box-shadow border|a|#BFA648|2px}} | groupstyle = background:#CC0033; color:#FFFFFF; {{box-shadow border|a|#BFA648|2px}} | abovestyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | belowstyle = background:#FFFFFF; color:#000000; {{box-shadow border|a|#CC0033|2px}} | above = The generations indicate descent from [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Emperor Meiji]], who founded the [[:en:Empire of Japan|Empire of Japan]]. | listclass = hlist | group1 = 1st generation | list1 = * Shizuko, Princess Hisa ([[:ja:久宮静子内親王|ja]]) * [[:en:Princess Masako Takeda|Masako, Princess Tsune]] * [[:en:Fusako Kitashirakawa|Fusako, Princess Kane]]* * [[:en:Princess Nobuko Asaka|Nobuko, Princess Fumi]] * [[Toshiko Higashikuni|Toshiko, Princess Yasu]]* * Takiko, Princess Sada ([[:ja:貞宮多喜子内親王|ja]]) | group2 = 2nd generation | list2 = ''None'' | group3 = 3rd generation | list3 = * [[Shigeko Higashikuni|Shigeko, Princess Teru]]* * [[:en:Sachiko, Princess Hisa|Sachiko, Princess Hisa]] * [[:en:Kazuko Takatsukasa|Kazuko, Princess Taka]]** * [[:en:Atsuko Ikeda|Atsuko, Princess Yori]]** * [[:en:Takako Shimazu|Takako, Princess Suga]]** * [[:en:Yasuko Konoe|Princess Yasuko of Mikasa]]** * [[:en:Masako Sen|Princess Masako of Mikasa]]** | group4 = 4th generation | list4 = * [[:en:Sayako Kuroda|Sayako, Princess Nori]]** * [[:en:Princess Akiko of Mikasa|Princess Akiko of Mikasa]] * [[:en:Princess Yōko of Mikasa|Princess Yōko of Mikasa]] * [[:en:Princess Tsuguko of Takamado|Princess Tsuguko of Takamado]] * [[Noriko Senge|Princess Noriko of Takamado]]** * [[:en:Ayako Moriya|Princess Ayako of Takamado]]** | group5 = 5th generation | list5 = * [[:en:Aiko, Princess Toshi|Aiko, Princess Toshi]] * [[:en:Mako Komuro|Princess Mako of Akishino]]** * [[:en:Princess Kako of Akishino|Princess Kako of Akishino]] |below = ''* Reduced to commoner status with the abolition of titles of nobility by the American occupation authorities.''
''** Lost the title upon her marriage.'' }} [[Category:Japan navigational boxes|Princesses]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Princesses]]
